zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Matthews於1455年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Richard John Lausoun25歲，母親Annabella Hind20歲。她於大約1469年與John Richard Pickworth Jackson在英國結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1533年5月17日在英國諾薩普頓史爾分頓享年78歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾摩利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Matthews于1455年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Richard John Lausoun25岁，母亲Annabella Hind20岁。她于大约1469年与John Richard Pickworth Jackson在英国结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1533年5月17日在英国諾薩普頓史爾分頓享年78岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾摩利。

nameMeanings.name: Matthews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Ulster and County Louth): patronymic from the personal name Matthew . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, such as German Matthäus (from the personal name Matthäus, from Latin Matthaeus) and Slovenian Matavž (from an obsolete vernacular form of the personal name Matevž, from Latin Matthaeus). Compare Mathews .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Mathghamhna (see McMahon ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Matthews was born in 1455, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard John Lausoun, was 25 and her mother, Annabella Hind, was 20. She married John Richard Pickworth Jackson about 1469, in England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 17 May 1533, in Finedon, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Morley, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Matthews est née en 1455, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard John Lausoun, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Annabella Hind, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Richard Pickworth Jackson environ 1469, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 mai 1533, à Finedon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Morley, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Matthews 1455 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard John Lausoun 25 und ihre Mutter Annabella Hind 20. Sie hat um 1469 in England John Richard Pickworth Jackson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Mai 1533 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Finedon, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Morley, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Matthews è nata il nel 1455 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard John Lausoun, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Annabella Hind, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Richard Pickworth Jackson circa 1469, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 maggio 1533, nel Finedon, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Morley, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Matthewsが1455年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard John Lausounは25歳，母Annabella Hindは20歳であった。約1469年にイギリスでJohn Richard Pickworth Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1533年5月17日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアフィンエドンで78歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアモーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Matthews(이)가 1455년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard John Lausoun(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Hind(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1469년 영국에서 John Richard Pickworth Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 5월 17일 영국 노르섬프토실르 핑네던에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 모를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Matthews nasceu em 1455, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard John Lausoun, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Hind, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Richard Pickworth Jackson aproximadamente 1469, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de maio de 1533, em Finedon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Morley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Matthews родилась в 1455 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard John Lausoun было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Hind, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Richard Pickworth Jackson около 1469 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 17 мая 1533 г. в местности фаинедон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности морли, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Matthews nació en 1455, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard John Lausoun, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Annabella Hind, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Richard Pickworth Jackson aproximadamente 1469, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1533, en Finedon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Morley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
